title: Add inline validation to the checkout email field
body:
## Context

Users currently only see email-format errors after submitting the checkout form. We want to validate inline as they type so they can fix typos without losing context.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] When the user types in the email field, validate format on blur
- [ ] Show a red helper text below the field when the format is invalid
- [ ] Disable the 'Continue' button while the email field is invalid
- [ ] Validation must not fire while the field is empty (no premature error state)

## Definition of Done

- Unit tests cover all four AC items above
- Playwright e2e test covers the happy path + one invalid case
- No regression in the checkout form Lighthouse score (>=92)

## How to verify

Run `pnpm test:e2e -- checkout-email-validation` and confirm both specs pass.

repo: shop-frontend
size: S

Figma: https://figma.com/file/abc123/checkout-validation
